title: vandellia diffusa var. diffusa
intro: Vandellia diffusa var. diffusa, also known as water hawthorn or Indian water hawthorn, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Vandellia diffusa var. diffusa include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a diuretic to treat urinary problems. In herbal preparations, Vandellia diffusa var. diffusa is often combined with other plants to make teas, infusions, or decoctions that can be used to treat various health conditions.
